prompt: I am a senior data analyst at an ecommerce SaaS company. I know a lot about merchant reporting pain, but I do not directly own budget and my network is mostly peers, not founders. I would love a micro-SaaS, but I am not sure if I should sell a service first. Give me your honest recommendation.
assertions: Response includes a section header named Differentiation Profile
Response includes a section header named Best Bet
Response discusses the user's weak direct buyer access or distribution limits
Response explains whether a service first wedge should come before software
Response explains why this user can win using merchant reporting knowledge
Response includes a 7 day validation plan
Response includes a JSON block with a user_profile object
